name: Olive Country Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 Tablespoon dried ROSEMARY, (1-1/2 T) or 3 Tablespoons fresh rosemary, (1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven according to manufacturer's instructions.
2. In a large bowl, mix water, lard or oil, sugar, salt, and yeast until well combined.
3. Add rosemary and mix in.
4. Gradually add whole-wheat flour and bread flour, stirring continuously.
5. Fold in pitted olives (Moroccan or other high-quality black olives) for the final 5 minutes of mixing.
6. Shape the dough into a loaf and place it on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake according to manufacturer's instructions.
8. Turn off the oven when the bread is finished baking.
